svg.title: Attention scores with and without sink tokens resident
svg.desc: Two heatmaps showing attention scores from one head of a pretrained transformer. The left heatmap shows the typical pattern with the first three key positions strongly weighted regardless of query, plus a recent-token diagonal band. The right heatmap shows the same head when the first three key positions have been evicted by a sliding-window cache; the renormalized softmax produces a noisier diagonal band and overall less coherent attention. Colors range from dark navy (low attention) to bright yellow (high attention).
svg.text: One attention head, two cache policies
A 32-position causal attention pattern with sinks resident (left) and with the first three positions evicted by a sliding window (right)
Pattern after Xiao et al., "Efficient Streaming Language Models with Attention Sinks" (ICLR 2024). Schematic; values are illustrative.
